layout.footerDescription: Virtual eye-care assessment, booking, and consultation workflows built for clinical integration readiness.
layout.medicalDisclaimer: Medical disclaimer: this interface supports care workflow planning and is not a medical device, diagnostic tool, or clinical decision system.
layout.footerReviewCopy: Built for privacy-conscious virtual eye care.

auth.secureAccount: Secure account experience designed for privacy-conscious care.
auth.loginIntro: Access assessment, virtual consultation, and care workflow tools in one calm, secure experience.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your EyeCare account
auth.loginSuccess: Sign in successful. Redirecting to your workspace.
auth.loginError: No mock account was found for that email or phone number.
auth.registerIntro: Create your secure care profile and move from assessment to specialist consultation with clarity.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created. Redirecting to your workspace.
auth.validEmailError: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.passwordLengthError: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
auth.consentError: You must accept the terms of use and privacy policy.
auth.forgotIntro: Use your account email to prepare password reset instructions and return securely to sign in.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your account email to continue.
auth.resetReady: Password reset instructions are ready for {email}.
auth.resetNote: Secure reset delivery will be available through verified account channels.

home.description: Board-certified ophthalmologists available virtually. Get a clinically guided dry eye assessment and a personalized treatment plan without the waiting room.
home.symptomsDescription: Dry eye can show up in many ways. If any of these feel familiar, you're not alone and we're here to help.
home.processDescription: Simple steps to clearer answers and better eye health.
home.trustDescription: Thoughtful design and clinical rigor you can rely on.
home.ctaTitle: Ready for clearer, more comfortable eyes?
home.virtualConsultationText: Connect with a specialist from home.
home.trustedSpecialistsText: Care from Ontario-licensed ophthalmologists with eye health expertise.
home.saveTimeText: No waiting rooms. Flexible appointments that fit your schedule.
home.comprehensiveCareText: From assessment to treatment, EyeCare supports every step.
home.proudlyCanadianText: Canadian-based care with privacy and health in mind.
home.burningText: A sharp or fiery sensation that often worsens as the day goes on.
home.grittyText: Feels like something is in your eye, even when there isn't.
home.tearingText: Watery eyes that may be your body's response to irritation.
home.visionText: Vision that blurs or shifts, especially with prolonged focus.
home.lightText: Bright lights can feel intense or uncomfortable.
home.triggersText: Wind, smoke, dry air, or screens can make symptoms worse.
home.stepAccountText: Sign up in minutes and set up your secure EyeCare profile.
home.stepAssessmentText: Answer guided questions to help us understand your symptoms.
home.stepResultsText: Receive a clear summary and tailored recommendations.
home.stepSpecialistText: Discuss your results virtually with an Ontario-licensed expert.
home.trustSpecialistsText: Care designed and reviewed by Ontario-licensed ophthalmologists with deep clinical expertise.
home.trustPrivacyText: Your data is encrypted, secure, and never shared without your consent.
home.trustEvidenceText: Built on current clinical guidelines and validated screening methodologies.
home.trustWaitingText: Complete your assessment and consult from the comfort of your home.

admin.title: Administration
admin.description: Manage care operations, appointment readiness, and provider schedules.
admin.accessNotice: Production admin access must be protected by backend authorization and audit logging.
admin.patientsDescription: Review patient initials and account statuses.
admin.assessmentsDescription: Review assessment queue and severity status.
admin.profileDescription: Review admin account details and sign out.

profile.patientDescription: Review contact details, communication preferences, and account settings.
profile.providerDescription: Review provider contact details, workspace preferences, and account settings.
profile.adminDescription: Review admin contact details, operations preferences, and account settings.
profile.patientNotice: Keep sensitive health information inside approved secure systems.
profile.providerNotice: Clinical workspace access is protected by role-based permissions and audit controls.
profile.adminNotice: Administrative access must remain limited to approved operational workflows.
profile.preferencesDescription: Manage how we communicate with you.
profile.privacyMattersDescription: We never share your personal information with third parties.
profile.updateAnytimeDescription: You can change your preferences at any time.

mock.productLidKitDescription: A simple daily care bundle for eyelid hygiene routines.
mock.productDropsDescription: Comfort-focused drops commonly used for dryness support.
mock.productMaskDescription: Reusable warm compress support for at-home eye comfort.

patientDashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your eye care journey.

patientDashboard.nextVisit: Your next specialist visit is scheduled for {date} at {time}.

patientDashboard.viewLatestResultDescription: Review your most recent assessment results and recommendations.
patientDashboard.bookConsultationDescription: Choose a specialist and find a time that works for you.
patientDashboard.blogDescription: Read eye-care education and community updates.
patientDashboard.symptomTrackerDescription: Track your daily symptoms and identify patterns over time.
patientDashboard.profileDescription: Manage your personal information, preferences, and account details.
patientDashboard.shopDescription: Browse eye-care support products and manage your orders.
patientDashboard.trackerCopy: Review dryness, irritation, triggers, and recent comfort patterns from your tracker.
patientDashboard.resultCopy: Current assessment summary for provider review.
patientDashboard.securePrivateText: Your data is protected with industry-standard encryption.
patientDashboard.licensedSpecialistsText: Care from experienced eye care professionals.
patientDashboard.noWaitingRoomsText: Access care from the comfort of home.
patientDashboard.evidenceBasedCareText: Our approach is based on clinical guidelines.

assessment.title: Patient assessment
assessment.description: Complete a short intake to organize symptoms and safety context before specialist review.
assessment.warning: This assessment supports visit preparation and does not replace emergency care or clinical advice.
assessment.qSafetyChange: Have you noticed a sudden change in vision?
assessment.qSafetyChangeDescription: Safety screening question prepared for specialist review.
assessment.qSafetyPain: Are you experiencing severe eye pain?
assessment.qSafetyPainDescription: Safety screening question prepared for clinical intake context.
assessment.qDryComfort: How often do your eyes feel dry or irritated?
assessment.qDryComfortDescription: Dry eye symptom question for your care profile.
assessment.qDryScreen: Do symptoms feel worse during screen use or reading?
assessment.qDryScreenDescription: Symptom pattern question for specialist review.

results.title: Results overview
results.description: Your assessment summary is organized for care planning and specialist review.
results.safetyNotice: Seek urgent care immediately for sudden vision loss, severe pain, injury, or rapidly worsening symptoms.
results.recommendationsDescription: Structured next steps for your visit preparation.
results.recommendationsCopy: Continue to the care plan to review your next steps and prepare for a specialist consultation.
results.providerPreparationDescription: A concise summary for the consultation workflow.
results.providerPreparationCopy: Your answers are organized into a clear summary for the provider review screen.
results.carePlanDescription: Plan access before booking your consultation.
results.carePlanCopy: Unlock your plan details, review visit preparation, and continue to appointment booking.
results.softGateDescription: Your severity summary is visible. Subscribe to view product recommendations, plan details, and booking actions.

subscribe.title: Specialist care plan
subscribe.description: Unlock a structured care plan review, visit preparation, and next-step booking support.
subscribe.paymentNotice: Payment collection will be handled by approved secure checkout systems at launch.
subscribe.planDescription: A guided plan for assessment review and specialist consultation readiness.
subscribe.planCopy: Full results, care planning access, product recommendations, and specialist booking workflow.

booking.title: Book consultation
booking.description: Choose a specialist, appointment type, date, and time for your virtual visit.
booking.availabilityNotice: Final appointment availability will be confirmed through approved scheduling systems.
booking.detailsDescription: Select the appointment details for your consultation.
booking.prepared: Appointment request prepared. Your consultation room is ready for the next step.

consultation.title: Consultation room
consultation.description: Prepare for a secure virtual visit with your specialist.
consultation.notice: Your specialist will review the assessment summary before the visit begins.
consultation.notesCopy: Notes from the visit can be reviewed here during the care workflow.

legal.termsDescription: These terms describe expected use for the EyeCare assessment, booking, and consultation experience.
legal.termsCardCopy: EyeCare supports care workflow planning and does not replace a health professional, emergency care, or in-person assessment when urgent symptoms are present.
legal.privacyDescription: Content is being finalized before launch. EyeCare is designed around privacy-conscious workflows and careful handling of sensitive health information.
legal.privacyCardCopy: Keep sensitive health information inside approved secure systems. Personal data should only be handled through verified production workflows.
legal.privacySystemsCopy: Account, assessment, booking, and consultation information should be handled only through approved secure systems when production integrations are enabled.
legal.blogDescription: Articles and care workflow resources are being prepared for launch.
legal.blogCardDescription: Browse editorial topics prepared for patients and care teams.
legal.blogIntro: Practical articles for patients preparing for assessment, consultation, and ongoing eye comfort.
legal.blogAssessmentTitle: Preparing for your dry eye assessment
legal.blogAssessmentExcerpt: What to expect before completing a guided symptom assessment.
legal.blogConsultationTitle: Making the most of a virtual eye visit
legal.blogConsultationExcerpt: How to prepare questions, environment notes, and care goals.
legal.blogComfortTitle: Daily comfort habits for dry eyes
legal.blogComfortExcerpt: Simple routines that may support comfort between visits.
